source_reviews.notes: The registered Census page links the official 2022 NAICS manual, whose 811192 entry supports the cleaning, washing and waxing definition and the detail, mobile and self-service examples.

The filing supports Mister's express-exterior format, kiosks/team-member process, monthly UWC subscription model and 76% UWC share of 2025 wash sales. It does not measure industry AI adoption or an AI adoption timeline, which the record labels as low-confidence estimates.

The page supports a current proprietary-data M&A report, post-2022 stabilization, strategic add-ons and an active buyer universe. It does not measure owner age or provide the selected consolidator count, both disclosed as estimates.

The update supports the February 2025 agreement to sell Driven Brands' U.S. car-wash business to Whistle Express for $385 million. A single strategic sale supports buyer activity but does not quantify succession supply or the total consolidator count.

The advisory table supports the Q1 2025 $1-5M and $5-10M EBITDA multiples for express exterior and full service, and the page links subscriptions to retention and recurring revenue. It does not support the owner-age estimate.
The article supports the post-2022 financing shock, lower M&A activity and prices, peak multiple compression, pent-up supply and intense local express-wash competition.

publication_caveats: inputs.ai_replaceable_share: The supplied 5-digit occupational mix includes oil-change/lube-shop occupations and is a disclosed proxy.
inputs.ai_replaceable_share: Fractions exclude pre-existing tunnel, gate and kiosk automation that is not AI.
inputs.pi_dist: No trade-area-level supply, pricing or churn data are available for the target EBITDA band.
inputs.pi_moat: Mister is a scaled public benchmark, not evidence that a regional target has the same subscription density.
inputs.t50_years: No representative current AI-adoption survey for NAICS 811192 was located; this is a bounded judgment.
inputs.current_adoption_pct: Do not equate kiosks, gates or tunnel equipment with AI adoption.
inputs.historical_analogs: This is not evidence of a measured generative-AI adoption curve.
inputs.owners_60plus_pct: Validate owner age, real-estate ownership and format locally before underwriting.
inputs.owners_60plus_pct.succession_shortage_documented: This is not a nationwide owner-survey result.
inputs.active_consolidators: Buyer activity differs substantially by region, format and real-estate ownership.
inputs.buy_mult: Published advisory benchmark, not confidential deal comps; EBITDAR and owned real estate require separate treatment.
inputs.exit_mult: Exit depends on local supply, membership churn and real-estate/lease terms; no multiple expansion is assumed outside the published range.
inputs.pricing_structure: Mister's 76% UWC sales share is a scaled-public-company benchmark, not an industry average.
summary: Mechanics, digests, dataset injection, fresh finalization, memo rendering and arithmetic all pass. The sources support a durable physical service with a narrow AI surface and active but format-dependent M&A; all material proxy, adoption, owner-age and valuation limitations are already disclosed, so the record is publishable with caveats.
